pi_items.source: export_result.sh output path and verifier.py input path
setup_task.sh dynamically generates this text file
setup_task.sh brief text and verifier.py logic explicitly define and check these values
MAVLink command 178 corresponds to DO_CHANGE_SPEED; verifier.py checks for speed ~1.0 m/s and altitude >= 140.0m (which satisfies the prompt's 'at least 150m' requirement).

privileged_info_summary: The task relies entirely on synthetically generated configuration data and instructions. The target plan file path (/home/ga/Documents/QGC/vertical_profile.plan) and integration brief (/home/ga/Documents/QGC/payload_integration_brief.txt) are explicitly defined. The required parameters (SCR_ENABLE=1, SCR_HEAP_SIZE=81920, SERIAL4_PROTOCOL=28, SERIAL4_BAUD=115, LOG_DISARMED=1, BRD_BOOT_DELAY=3000) match both the generated brief and verifier logic. The mission requirements correctly map MAVLink command 178 to DO_CHANGE_SPEED (1.0 m/s) and enforce a minimum waypoint altitude of 140.0 m via verifier logic to accommodate the prompt's 150 m requirement.
